case_title: MOSHE ATIA POSTON VS. LIAM CAFFERKEY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,050.00 FILED BY POSTON, MOSHE ATIA AS TO DEFENDANT CAFFERKEY, LIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY POSTON, MOSHE ATIA CAFFERKEY, LIAM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-29-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES THEN CASE IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MOSHE ATIA POSTON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT LIAM CAFFERKEY AND WITNESS MICHAEL CAFFERKEY ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT IS TO PAY PLAINTIFF $375.00 PER STIPULATED AGREEMENT REACHED IN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MOSHE ATIA POSTON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIAM CAFFERKEY IS NOT PRESENT. PER AGREEMENT REACHED AT THE LAST HEARING, THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
